---
name: Feedback
about: Share how Memgram worked for your use case
title: "[feedback] "
labels: feedback
---

**Your use case**
What kind of agent/app did you wrap it into?

**Extraction quality**
Did it capture the right facts/preferences from real conversations? Examples welcome.

**Habit threshold**
A preference becomes a proposed instruction after 7 reinforcements. Too soon? Too late?

**Integration friction**
Was the two-line wrap genuinely drop-in? Anything awkward?

**Anything else**
What would make you actually use this?
